# Phase 2 VPS periodic-readiness scheduled task evidence

evidence_status: PENDING
owner_verified: false
task_registered: false
last_run_verified: false
task_name: phase2-periodic-readiness-check
provider:
region:
registered_at_utc:
last_run_at_utc:
last_run_result:
checker:

notes:
- Replace this template after `scripts/install_phase2_periodic_checks_task.ps1` has been run on the selected VPS.
- Run first with `-WhatIfOnly`, then register the task only after all VPS paths are verified.
- Mark `last_run_verified: true` only after the task has run once and regenerated `PHASE1_EXTERNAL_HEALTH.json` / `PHASE2_READINESS_REPORT.md`.
- This scheduled task must only run report/readiness checks. It must not start MT5, change dry-run mode, enable demo trading, or authorize broker execution.
